constraints: core.yaml path_allowlist is enforced as an EXACT rglob set over support/checkers/profiles (rule_runners.run_path_allowlist lines 83-91 raise on observed-minus-allowed). Any new profile file NOT added to core.yaml allowlist makes the core profile RED. Both B2 and B3 add files -> both edit core.yaml -> they MUST serialize (B2 then B3); they cannot be parallelized.

check_profile.py auto-discovers profiles via glob('*.yaml') (lines 1048,1108) under --all; case sections are dispatched by section-name key (SECTION_DISPATCH, e.g. line 251 compose_building_case). Moved sections must keep their recognized section keys verbatim.
KERNEL_CHECK_IDS is fixed by KERNEL_DISPATCH (line 921); the moved kernel_check IDs already exist, so no new kernel-check registration is needed unless a runner is added.

Checker-lib chokepoints (reference §5): support/checkers/lib/{case_runners,kernel_checks,rule_runners}.py are multi-profile-pinned; if any split needs a runner change, that lib edit is an additional serialization point.
agent_axis_behavioral.yaml self-pins its own path (path_exists line 59), so it must remain on disk as a thinned profile after B3; do not delete the file.
TRUTH-before-QUALITY: this return bounds work only; it does not assert pass/success/quality and does not choose Movement.

Per-moved-check mutation-RED expectations are not enumerated; the write Building must list them.
Whether any case section is shared/duplicated and would need a fixture twin before relocation.

Semantic correctness/coverage of the relocated checks after a split (each needs its own --self-test / mutation-RED in the write Building; reference §8).
That the section->sub-profile partition proposed here is the only valid cut (it is a candidate, not an admitted taxonomy).

returned.objective_summary: Produce the implementation plan (no edits) for the P9 checker/profile diet follow-on after the B1 reference doc. Scope is ONE implementation Building that runs two splits in a fixed internal serial order: B2 = decompose the 4172-line building_skill_preset_agent_tool_hardening.yaml into concern-coherent sub-profiles; then B3 = separate the F4 provider runtime-smoke kernel_checks out of agent_axis_behavioral.yaml into a dedicated runtime-smoke profile.
